name: keap
description: Knowledge Explorer and Preserver — gamified knowledge management, built for the nOS platform.
//: Frontend (React/Tailwind/shadcn/@tanstack/react-query/react-router-dom) deps are carried over verbatim from the existing repo package.json — omitted here for brevity. The KEY change vs the old repo is the addition of a REAL standalone backend (express + tsx + a `start` script) so the API and SQLite persistence exist in production, not only under `vite` dev middleware.
